name: flow-packages-oxidized-workspace
description: Yarn workspace root for the in-tree oxidized Flow packages (flow-parser-oxidized, flow-estree-oxidized, flow-eslint-oxidized, babel-plugin-syntax-flow-parser-oxidized, prettier-plugin-flow-parser-oxidized, flow-transform-oxidized). Pattern after xplat/js/graphql. The workspaces array is intentionally limited to the oxidized packages we control in this stack — the other siblings under flow/packages/ (flow-parser, flow-remove-types, etc.) continue to operate as standalone yarn packages outside this workspace_root.
